text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm heading to my office before training when...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Okay, okay, I'll make this the last one! Hehe.
Hehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Gah! How long have you been here, Trainer?!
Why didn't you say anything?!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Ahem. I have received a letter from a fan. But
look, look! Check it out! Isn't this great?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The letter she shows me is addressed to "Big Sis
Ines Fujin."
choice_data_list: Is this from your little sister?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Nope, it's from a fan. But she says I'm like a big
sister to her!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
This makes me so happy! It's like I'm family to her,
and I'm supporting her right back...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
"You're so kind and cool... I wish I had a big sister
like you."

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Hehehe. "I wish I had a big sister like you," she
said...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
You know, I always thought that the reason I run
is because I love it...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But when I look at this letter and stuff... I start to
think it'd be nice if I could run in a way that made
the audience think of me as family.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hmm, maybe I'm asking for too much?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thanks. But if I want to make that happen,
I'll need to give today's training double the usual
effort!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: All right, Trainer! I'm ready when you are!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to her fan letter, Ines Fujin stays
energized the whole day!
